text: What’s the count of transactions?
How many transactions are confirmed?
What is the total amount of transaction ETH/Ether?
How much ETH/Ether was transferred?
What is the balance of account 0xAddress?
cypher:
MATCH (from:Account {address: '0xAddress'})<-[:TO]-(tx:Transaction)
WITH SUM(tx.value) AS totalReceived
MATCH (to:Account {address: '0xAddress'})-[:SENT]->(tx2:Transaction)
WITH totalReceived, SUM(tx2.value) AS totalSent
RETURN totalReceived - totalSent AS accountBalance

text: How much ETH/Ether does account 0xAddress hold?
cypher:
MATCH (from:Account {address: '0xAddress'})<-[:TO]-(tx:Transaction)
WITH SUM(tx.value) AS totalReceived
MATCH (to:Account {address: '0xAddress'})-[:SENT]->(tx2:Transaction)
WITH totalReceived, SUM(tx2.value) AS totalSent
RETURN totalReceived - totalSent AS accountBalance

text: What is the total amount of ETH/Ether sent from account 0xAddress?
How much ETH/Ether was sent from account 0xAddress?
What’s the count of transactions sent from account 0xAddress?
How many transactions were sent from account 0xAddress?
What is the total amount of ETH/Ether received by account 0xAddress?
How much ETH/Ether was received by account 0xAddress?
What’s the count of transactions received by account 0xAddress?
How many transactions were received by account 0xAddress?
What is the total amount of ETH/Ether sent from account 0xAddress1 to account 0xAddress2?
How much ETH/Ether was sent from account 0xAddress1 to account 0xAddress2?
What’s the count of transactions sent from account 0xAddress1 to account 0xAddress2?
How many transactions was sent from 0xAddress1 to 0xAddress2?
Show the transaction history of account 0xAddress.
cypher:
MATCH (a:Account {address: '0xAddress'})-[:SENT]->(tx:Transaction)
RETURN DISTINCT 'Sent' AS transactionType, tx.transactionHash AS transactionHash, tx.value AS value, tx.timestamp AS timestamp, tx.gas AS gas, tx.blockNumber as blockNumber, tx.transactionIndex as transactionIndex
UNION
MATCH (a:Account {address: '0xAddress'})<-[:TO]-(tx:Transaction)
RETURN DISTINCT 'Received' AS transactionType, tx.transactionHash AS transactionHash, tx.value AS value, tx.timestamp AS timestamp, tx.gas AS gas, tx.blockNumber as blockNumber, tx.transactionIndex as transactionIndex
ORDER BY timestamp DESC

text: Show the transaction history received by account 0xAddress.
cypher:
MATCH (a:Account {address: '0xAddress'})<-[:TO]-(tx:Transaction)
RETURN DISTINCT 'Received' AS transactionType, tx.transactionHash AS transactionHash, tx.value AS value, tx.timestamp AS timestamp, tx.gas AS gas, tx.blockNumber as blockNumber, tx.transactionIndex as transactionIndex
ORDER BY timestamp DESC

text: Show the transaction history sent from account 0xAddress.
cypher:
MATCH (a:Account {address: '0xAddress'})-[:SENT]->(tx:Transaction)
RETURN DISTINCT 'Sent' AS transactionType, tx.transactionHash AS transactionHash, tx.value AS value, tx.timestamp AS timestamp, tx.gas AS gas, tx.blockNumber as blockNumber, tx.transactionIndex as transactionIndex
ORDER BY timestamp DESC

text: Show the transaction history sent from account 0xAddress1 to account 0xAddress2.
cypher:
MATCH (a:Account {address: '0xAddress1'})-[:SENT]->(tx:Transaction)-[:TO]->(b:Account {address: '0xAddress2'})
RETURN DISTINCT tx.transactionHash AS transactionHash, tx.value AS value, tx.timestamp AS timestamp, tx.gas AS gas, tx.blockNumber as blockNumber, tx.transactionIndex as transactionIndex
ORDER BY timestamp DESC

text: Show the last N transactions sent from account 0xAddress.
cypher:
MATCH (a:Account {address: '0xAddress'})-[:SENT]->(tx:Transaction)
RETURN DISTINCT 'Sent' AS transactionType, tx.transactionHash AS transactionHash, tx.value AS value, tx.timestamp AS timestamp, tx.gas AS gas, tx.blockNumber as blockNumber, tx.transactionIndex as transactionIndex
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT N

text: Show the last N transactions received by account 0xAddress.
cypher:
MATCH (a:Account {address: '0xAddress'})<-[:TO]-(tx:Transaction)
RETURN DISTINCT 'Received' AS transactionType, tx.transactionHash AS transactionHash, tx.value AS value, tx.timestamp AS timestamp, tx.gas AS gas, tx.blockNumber as blockNumber, tx.transactionIndex as transactionIndex
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT N

text: Show the last N transactions.
cypher:
MATCH (a:Account)-[:SENT]->(tx:Transaction)-[:TO]->(b:Account)
RETURN DISTINCT a.address AS fromAddress, b.address AS toAddress, tx.value AS value, tx.timestamp AS timestamp, tx.gas AS gas, tx.blockNumber AS blockNumber, tx.transactionHash AS transactionHash, tx.transactionIndex AS transactionIndex
ORDER BY tx.timestamp DESC
LIMIT N

text: Which block is the transaction 0xTransactionHash in?
cypher:
MATCH (tx:Transaction {transactionHash: '0xTransactionHash'})
RETURN DISTINCT tx.blockNumber AS blockNumber, tx.transactionIndex as transactionIndex
LIMIT 1

text: Is there a path between account 0xAddress1 and account 0xAddress2?
cypher:
MATCH (a:Account {address: '0xAddress1'}), (b:Account {address: '0xAddress2'})
MATCH path = (a)-[*BFS]->(b)
RETURN CASE WHEN path IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS pathExists

text: Is there any relationship or transaction path from account 0xAddress1 to account 0xAddress2?
cypher:
MATCH (a:Account {address: '0xAddress1'}), (b:Account {address: '0xAddress2'})
MATCH path = (a)-[*BFS]->(b)
RETURN CASE WHEN path IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS pathExists

text: Can you verify if account 0xAddress1 and account 0xAddress2 are connected through transactions?
cypher:
MATCH (a:Account {address: '0xAddress1'}), (b:Account {address: '0xAddress2'})
MATCH path = (a)-[*BFS]->(b)
RETURN CASE WHEN path IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS pathExists
